rashid-stand-light-punch.name: Standing Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled

rashid-stand-medium-punch.name: Standing Medium Punch
rashid-stand-medium-punch.notes_sc: Useful for starting combos and block pressure; has a Target Combo follow-up that can be canceled into 236LP for safety on block or into higher damage routes on hit

rashid-stand-heavy-punch.name: Standing Heavy Punch
rashid-stand-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Decent mid-range button with a strong hitbox for counterpoking; can combo to 214HK after Drive Rush or Punish Counter; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

rashid-stand-light-kick.name: Standing Light Kick
rashid-stand-light-kick.notes_sc: Highest hitstun light normal makes it useful for special cancels (the only light normal that can combo into 214LK naturally); DR cancel is delayed until after active frames

rashid-stand-medium-kick.name: Standing Medium Kick
notes: 2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses
rashid-stand-medium-kick.notes_sc: Combo starter that links into 5MP or into itself on counter-hit; 2 extra recovery frames on whiff

rashid-stand-heavy-kick.name: Standing Heavy Kick
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
Forces a juggle state when the attack lands as a Punish Counter
rashid-stand-heavy-kick.notes_sc: Puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; Punish Counter launches grounded opponents into limited juggle state and causes airborne opponents to fall closer to Rashid; decent anti-air hitbox, but very slow and cannot hit cross-up; high pushback on hit and block; forces stand on hit; final 2 active frames whiff on crouching opponents unless they extend a vertical hurtbox; has an extended hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles

rashid-crouch-light-punch.name: Crouching Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled
rashid-crouch-light-punch.notes_sc: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame; topmost hurtbox on frames 1-7 is vulnerable only to aerial strikes (preventing its use as an anti-air)

rashid-crouch-medium-punch.name: Crouching Medium Punch
rashid-crouch-medium-punch.notes_sc: Combo and pressure tool with many active frames for easy oki; can anti-air on frames 7-9 but cannot hit opponents behind Rashid; whiffs on crouching opponents at longer ranges unless they extend a vertical hurtbox

rashid-crouch-heavy-punch.name: Crouching Heavy Punch
notes: 2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses
rashid-crouch-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Decent poke that can be buffered into supers; good close range Punish Counter starter (combos into 5HP), but high pushback makes it less reliable at longer ranges; 2 extra recovery frames on whiff; topmost hurtboxes on frames 8-14 are projectile invincible (avoids Sagat's MP/HP Tiger Shot)

rashid-crouch-light-kick.name: Crouching Light Kick
notes: Can be rapid canceled

rashid-crouch-medium-kick.name: Crouching Medium Kick
rashid-crouch-medium-kick.notes_sc: Standard cancelable low poke; Range: 1.405; DR cancel is delayed until after active frames

rashid-crouch-heavy-kick.name: Crouching Heavy Kick
notes: Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter

rashid-jump-medium-punch.name: Jumping Medium Punch
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
rashid-jump-medium-punch.notes_sc: Puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; cancels into j.214K from forward jumps; lower body projectile invuln 9-22f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

rashid-jump-heavy-punch.name: Jumping Heavy Punch
notes: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent on the 2nd attack
rashid-jump-heavy-punch.notes_sc: 1st hit puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state, 2nd hit causes spike knockdown; if 1st hit is stand blocked, the 2nd hit will not hit overhead against crouch block; lower body projectile invuln 8-23f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

rashid-jump-light-kick.name: Jumping Light Kick
rashid-jump-light-kick.notes_sc: Longest horizontal range of Rashid's jump normals

rashid-jump-medium-kick.name: Jumping Medium Kick
rashid-jump-medium-kick.notes_sc: Cross-up; lower body projectile invuln 7-20f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

rashid-jump-heavy-kick.name: Jumping Heavy Kick
notes: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent when transitioning from Wing Stroke or Arabian Skyhigh
rashid-jump-heavy-kick.notes_sc: When used after j.214K or 214P~4K, causes a spike knockdown vs. airborne opponents; lower body projectile invuln 10-19f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

rashid-run.name: Run
notes: Continue to hold forward and Rashid will break out into a sprint. Rashid will stop after covering a certain distance or if you release the input
Movement can be stoppped from frames 2 - 60
Can transition to either a branching attack or forward jump from frames 6 - 60
5 frames of recovery added when movement is stopped
Can be affected by air currents from frames 1 - 60
rashid-run.notes_sc: Input by holding forward after a forward dash; cancelable into 6P or 6K follow-ups on frames 18-72; after 72f, Rashid has 18f stopping recovery if no follow-up is input (90f total); stopping the run early has 5f recovery; no stopping recovery if jumping forward out of the run animation (neutral/back jump still plays out the 5f recovery); counter-hit state during entire run animation; affected by Air Current for entire duration except for 18f recovery, causing Rashid to run faster

rashid-backup.name: Backup
notes: During run
A low attack that can be performed during Run. Moves you behind the opponent when it hits
Considered airborne from frames 1 - 17
Only the second attack can be canceled into a Super Art
rashid-backup.notes_sc: Crouching state for entire move duration; on hit, connects twice and switches sides, remaining projectile invincible throughout the entire animation; on block, connects once and stays on the same side; if opponent is cornered, Rashid is close enough for a follow-up combo; counter-hit/Punish Counter bonus advantage applies to both hits; frames 1-17 can be affected by Air Current

tempest-moon.name: Tempest Moon
notes: During run
An attack that can be performed during Run. This multi-hitting attack lets you expand your mix-up game
Can be affected by air currents from frames 1 - 15
Considered airborne from frames 6 - 21
Only the second attack can be canceled into a Super Art
2段目のみSAでキャンセル可能
tempest-moon.notes_sc: Counter-hit/Punish Counter bonus advantage applies to both hits; frames 1-3 can be affected by Air Current, becoming the Enhanced version

air-current-boosted-tempest-moon.name: [Air Current Boosted] Tempest Moon
air-current-boosted-tempest-moon.name_ja: 【気流強化】 テンペスト・ムーン
notes: From run when coming in contact with an air current
Considered airborne from frames 20 - 35

flapping-spin.name: Flapping Spin
notes: A two-hit combination attack. The first attack can be canceled into special moves
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent on the 1st attack
Can be affected by air currents from frames 3 - 10
flapping-spin.notes_sc: () refers to startup of 2nd hit; 1st hit puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state (or maintains juggle state when used mid-combo); 2nd hit causes air reset; counter-hit/Punish Counter bonus advantage applies to both hits; decent range for whiff punishing; can be affected by Air Current on frames 3-10 (travels fullscreen)

beak-assault.name: Beak Assault
notes: An overhead attack that cannot be blocked while crouching
Can be affected by air currents from frames 4 - 25
beak-assault.notes_sc: Long-ranged overhead that can lead to combos if well-spaced; not actually airborne despite the animation; can be affected by Air Current on frames 4-25 (travels nearly fullscreen)

crescent-kick.name: Crescent Kick
notes: An advancing attack that's great against an opponent's low kicks
3 frames of recovery added when the attack misses
Can be affected by air currents from frames 6 - 19
crescent-kick.notes_sc: 3f extra recovery on whiff; useful for hopping over low pokes and comboing into MP normals on Punish Counter, but not actually airborne; good option out of Drive Rush; can be spaced to hit on later active frames for better advantage; can be affected by Air Current on frames 6-19 (travels fullscreen)

blitz-strike.name: Blitz Strike
notes: A jump attack that sends you bounding forward over your opponent when it hits or is blocked
Can transition to a mid-air special move from frames 12 - 23 when the attack hits or is blocked
Can transition to any mid-air normal attack or special move from frame 24 until landing on the ground
Produces a floor bound when hitting a mid-air opponent
blitz-strike.notes_sc: Can be performed during forward jump or after j.214K; causes spike knockdown and OTG juggle state vs. airborne opponents; cancelable into j.214K; bounces off opponent on hit/block/parry, allowing Rashid to follow up with another airborne move (except another j.2HP) on frames 12-23; if Rashid hits airborne opponent 1f before landing, he lands immediately rather than bouncing; listed frame advantage assumes a grounded opponent and no follow-up air attack; juggle data in () refers to version after j.214K; lower body projectile invuln 10-19f except around attack hitbox

aerial-shot.name: Aerial Shot
notes: A powerful move for dealing with opponents up above that can be performed during a neutral jump
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
aerial-shot.notes_sc: During neutral jump only; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state, making it a useful air-to-air; lower body projectile invuln 8-19f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

rising-kick.name: Rising Kick
notes: A two-hit combination attack that can be canceled into special moves
rising-kick.notes_sc: Puts opponent into limited juggle state; both hits form a true blockstring and can cancel to 236LP for safety; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 4th recovery frame

side-flip.name: Side Flip
notes: A quick, advancing side flip. You can perform Front Flip from this move
Can transition to Front Flip from frames 18 - 24
Can be affected by air currents from frames 2 - 20
side-flip.notes_sc: Can input 4KK/5KK/6KK follow-up on frames 19-25; collision box disappears frames 8-23, allowing Rashid to pass through opponents; can be affected by Air Current on frames 2-20, traveling nearly fullscreen; travel distance: 1.7 (3.62 enhanced)

front-flip.name: Front Flip
notes: During Side Flip
Flip through the air towards the opponent. Jump attacks can be performed while in mid-air
Considered airborne from frames 11 - 43
Can transition to any mid-air normal attack, unique attack or special move from frame 22 - 40
Can be affected by air currents from frames 1 - 36
front-flip.notes_sc: Input during 6KK; holding forward/back/neutral direction affects flip distance; can use any air attack frames 22-40; can be affected by Air Current on frames 1-36, traveling forward fullscreen

spinning-mixer-light.name: Spinning Mixer (Light)
spinning-mixer-light.name_ja: スピニング・ミキサー (弱)
notes: Unleash multiple chops while spinning. Useful for combos and sequences, it also makes for a great anti-air attack
Attack properties changed by air currents are active from frames 2 - 17
5 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

air-current-boosted-spinning-mixer-light.name: [Air Current Boosted] Spinning Mixer (Light)
air-current-boosted-spinning-mixer-light.name_ja: [気流強化] スピニング・ミキサー (弱)
notes: When coming in contact with an air current

spinning-mixer-medium.name: Spinning Mixer (Medium)
spinning-mixer-medium.name_ja: スピニング・ミキサー (中)
notes: Unleash multiple chops while spinning. Useful for combos and sequences, it also makes for a great anti-air attack
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 6 - 10
Considered airborne from frames 13 - 60
Attack properties changed by air currents are active from frames 2 - 9
11 frames of landing recovery can be canceled by a special move or Super Art when the attack hits

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 6 - 10

air-current-boosted-spinning-mixer-mediu.name: [Air Current Boosted] Spinning Mixer (Medium)
air-current-boosted-spinning-mixer-mediu.name_ja: [気流強化] スピニング・ミキサー (中)
notes: When coming in contact with an air current
Considered airborne from frames 10 -97

spinning-mixer-heavy.name: Spinning Mixer (Heavy)
spinning-mixer-heavy.name_ja: スピニング・ミキサー (強)
notes: Unleash multiple chops while spinning. Useful for combos and sequences, it also makes for a great anti-air attack
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 6 - 12
Considered airborne from frames 13 - 63
Invincible to throws from frames 8 - 10
Attack properties changed by air currents are active from frames 2 - 6

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 6 - 12

air-current-boosted-spinning-mixer-heavy.name: [Air Current Boosted] Spinning Mixer (Heavy)
air-current-boosted-spinning-mixer-heavy.name_ja: [気流強化] スピニング・ミキサー (強)
notes: When coming in contact with an air current
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 6 - 12
Considered airborne from frames 9 - 91

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 6 - 12

spinning-mixer-od.name: Spinning Mixer (OD)
spinning-mixer-od.name_ja: スピニング・ミキサー (OD)
notes: Unleash multiple chops while spinning. Useful for combos and sequences, it also makes for a great anti-air attack
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 8
Can be affected by air currents from frames 2 - 9

air-current-boosted-spinning-mixer-od.name: [Air Current Boosted] Spinning Mixer (OD)
air-current-boosted-spinning-mixer-od.name_ja: [気流強化] スピニング・ミキサー (OD)
notes: When coming in contact with an air current
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 6
Can transition to mid-air special moves from frames 67 - 71
Considered airborne from frames 10 - 97

eagle-spike-light.name: Eagle Spike (Light)
eagle-spike-light.name_ja: イーグル・スパイク (弱)
notes: Bound forward while delivering a powerful flying kick. Deals high damage and is easy to use to tack on an additional hit at the end of a combo
Attack properties changed by air currents are active from frames 4 - 15
Considered airborne from frames 9 - 38
Can only be canceled into Super Art 3 on hit

air-current-boosted-eagle-spike-light.name: [Air Current Boosted] Eagle Spike (Light)
air-current-boosted-eagle-spike-light.name_ja: [気流強化] イーグル・スパイク (弱)
notes: When coming in contact with an air current
Considered airborne from frames 9 - 38
Can only be canceled into Super Art 3 on hit

eagle-spike-medium.name: Eagle Spike (Medium)
eagle-spike-medium.name_ja: イーグル・スパイク (中)
notes: Bound forward while delivering a powerful flying kick. Deals high damage and is easy to use to tack on an additional hit at the end of a combo
Attack properties changed by air currents are active from frames 6 - 28
Considered airborne from frames 12 - 38

air-current-boosted-eagle-spike-medium.name: [Air Current Boosted] Eagle Spike (Medium)
air-current-boosted-eagle-spike-medium.name_ja: [気流強化] イーグル・スパイク (中)
notes: When coming in contact with an air current
Considered airborne from frames 17 - 45

eagle-spike-heavy.name: Eagle Spike (Heavy)
eagle-spike-heavy.name_ja: イーグル・スパイク (強)
notes: Bound forward while delivering a powerful flying kick. Deals high damage and is easy to use to tack on an additional hit at the end of a combo
Attack properties changed by air currents are active from frames 6 - 31
Considered airborne from frames 15 - 44

air-current-boosted-eagle-spike-heavy.name: [Air Current Boosted] Eagle Spike (Heavy)
air-current-boosted-eagle-spike-heavy.name_ja: [気流強化] イーグル・スパイク (強)
notes: When coming in contact with an air current
Considered airborne from frames 17 - 45

eagle-spike-od.name: Eagle Spike (OD)
notes: Bound forward while delivering a powerful flying kick. Deals high damage and is easy to use to tack on an additional hit at the end of a combo
Attack properties changed by air currents are active from frames 6 - 30
Considered airborne from frames 12 - 40

air-current-boosted-eagle-spike-od.name: [Air Current Boosted] Eagle Spike (OD)
air-current-boosted-eagle-spike-od.name_ja: [気流強化] イーグル・スパイク (OD)
notes: When coming in contact with an air current
Considered airborne from frames 12 - 40
Invincible to projectiles from frames 1 - 40

whirlwind-shot-light.name: Whirlwind Shot (Light)
whirlwind-shot-light.name_ja: ワールウィンド・ショット (弱)
notes: Spin around quickly to whip up a whirlwind before launching it with a kick. Can be powered up by holding the attack button
Transition to variation attack by releasing the button between frames 29 and 48
Transition to maximum attack version by holding the button for over 48 frames

charged-whirlwind-shot-light.name: Charged Whirlwind Shot (Light)
charged-whirlwind-shot-light.name_ja: ホールド ワールウィンド・ショット (弱)
notes: Spin around quickly to whip up a whirlwind before launching it with a kick. Can be powered up by holding the attack button

fully-charged-whirlwind-shot-light.name: Fully Charged Whirlwind Shot (Light)
fully-charged-whirlwind-shot-light.name_ja: ホールドMAX ワールウィンド・ショット (弱)
notes: After technique is finished, an air current that lasts 60 frames will be generated

whirlwind-shot-medium.name: Whirlwind Shot (Medium)
whirlwind-shot-medium.name_ja: ワールウィンド・ショット (中)
notes: Spin around quickly to whip up a whirlwind before launching it with a kick. Can be powered up by holding the attack button
Transition to variation attack by releasing the button between frames 29 and 48
Transition to maximum attack version by holding the button for over 48 frames

charged-whirlwind-shot-medium.name: Charged Whirlwind Shot (Medium)
charged-whirlwind-shot-medium.name_ja: ホールド ワールウィンド・ショット (中)
notes: Spin around quickly to whip up a whirlwind before launching it with a kick. Can be powered up by holding the attack button

fully-charged-whirlwind-shot-medium.name: Fully Charged Whirlwind Shot (Medium)
fully-charged-whirlwind-shot-medium.name_ja: ホールドMAX ワールウィンド・ショット (中)
notes: After technique is finished, an air current that lasts 60 frames will be generated

whirlwind-shot-heavy.name: Whirlwind Shot (Heavy)
whirlwind-shot-heavy.name_ja: ワールウィンド・ショット (強)
notes: Spin around quickly to whip up a whirlwind before launching it with a kick. Can be powered up by holding the attack button
Transition to variation attack by releasing the button between frames 29 and 48
Transition to maximum attack version by holding the button for over 48 frames

charged-whirlwind-shot-heavy.name: Charged Whirlwind Shot (Heavy)
charged-whirlwind-shot-heavy.name_ja: ホールド ワールウィンド・ショット (強)
notes: Spin around quickly to whip up a whirlwind before launching it with a kick. Can be powered up by holding the attack button

fully-charged-whirlwind-shot-heavy.name: Fully Charged Whirlwind Shot (Heavy)
fully-charged-whirlwind-shot-heavy.name_ja: ホールドMAX ワールウィンド・ショット (強)
notes: After technique is finished, an air current that lasts 60 frames will be generated

whirlwind-shot-od.name: Whirlwind Shot (OD)
whirlwind-shot-od.name_ja: ワールウィンド・ショット (OD)
notes: Spin around quickly to whip up a whirlwind before launching it with a kick. Can be powered up by holding the attack button
Transition to variation attack by holding the button for 36 frames

charged-whirlwind-shot-od.name: Charged Whirlwind Shot (OD)
charged-whirlwind-shot-od.name_ja: ホールド ワールウィンド・ショット (OD)
notes: Spin around quickly to whip up a whirlwind before launching it with a kick. Can be powered up by holding the attack button
After technique is finished, an air current that lasts 60 frames will be generated

arabian-cyclone-light.name: Arabian Cyclone (Light)
arabian-cyclone-light.name_ja: アラビアン・サイクロン (弱)
notes: A spinning kick attack that summons up a whirlwind in front of you. The move can be followed up with two different movement techniques
Can transition to branching attacks from frames 21 - 22

arabian-cyclone-medium.name: Arabian Cyclone (Medium)
arabian-cyclone-medium.name_ja: アラビアン・サイクロン (中)
notes: A spinning kick attack that summons up a whirlwind in front of you. The move can be followed up with two different movement techniques
Can transition to branching attacks from frames 26- 27

arabian-cyclone-heavy.name: Arabian Cyclone (Heavy)
arabian-cyclone-heavy.name_ja: アラビアン・サイクロン (強)
notes: A spinning kick attack that summons up a whirlwind in front of you. The move can be followed up with two different movement techniques
Can transition to branching attacks from frames 33 - 34

arabian-cyclone-od.name: Arabian Cyclone (OD)
arabian-cyclone-od.name_ja: アラビアン・サイクロン (OD)
notes: A spinning kick attack that summons up a whirlwind in front of you. The move can be followed up with two different movement techniques
Can transition to branching attacks from frames 26 - 27
3 frames of recovery added when the attack is blocked
After technique is finished, an air current that lasts 60 frames will be generated

wing-stroke-light.name: Wing Stroke
wing-stroke-light.name_ja: ウィング・ストローク
notes: During Arabian Cyclone
A majestic mid-air forward dash performed from Arabian Cyclone. Allows you to break into a jump attack at any point of the dash
Considered airborne from frames 22 - 61
Can transition to normal mid-air attacks from frames 32 - 51
Can be affected by air currents from frames 23 - 47
wing-stroke-light.notes_sc: Cancelable into air normals/specials on frames 32-51; can be affected by Air Current on frames 23-47; 6f landing recovery occurs if no air move is used

rolling-assault.name: Rolling Assault
notes: During Arabian Cyclone
A move performed from Arabian Cyclone that sends you rolling forward. A great technique for closing the distance from far or keeping the pressure on when you're up close
Can transition to branching attacks from frames 17 - 20
Can be affected by air currents from frames 8 - 25
rolling-assault.notes_sc: Crouching state 6-33f; cancelable into Nail Assault follow-up on frames 17-20; can be affected by Air Current on frames 8-25; can roll under most projectiles (loses to low ones like Juri 236LK or Rashid 236KK); Hit/Block Advantage after 214P connects: 214LP/214MP '''-5/-13'''; 214HP KD+43/+1; 214PP KD+39/'''-16'''

nail-assault.name: Nail Assault
notes: During Rolling Assault
A rolling kick delivered out of Rolling Assault. Very effective as a follow up attack on opponents launched by Arabian Cyclone
nail-assault.notes_sc: Puts opponent into limited juggle state; crouching state for entire move duration; cannot hit cross-ups behind Rashid; outside of juggles, only combos naturally from 214HP/214PP versions

arabian-skyhigh-light.name: Arabian Skyhigh (Light)
arabian-skyhigh-light.name_ja: アラビアン・スカイハイ (弱)
notes: Perform a spinning kick in mid-air that creates an air current that you then use to perform a mid-air jump. It's possible to perform jump attacks after the mid-air jump
Can be affected by air currents from frames 1 - 13
Can transition to any mid-air normal attack, unique attack or special move from frame 51 until landing on the ground
Can hit an opponent outside of a combo from frames 14 - 21

arabian-skyhigh-medium.name: Arabian Skyhigh (Medium)
arabian-skyhigh-medium.name_ja: アラビアン・スカイハイ (中)
notes: Perform a spinning kick in mid-air that creates an air current that you then use to perform a mid-air jump. It's possible to perform jump attacks after the mid-air jump
Can be affected by air currents from frames 1 - 18
Can transition to any mid-air normal attack, unique attack or special move from frame 59 until landing on the ground
Can hit an opponent outside of a combo from frames 19 - 26

arabian-skyhigh-heavy.name: Arabian Skyhigh (Heavy)
arabian-skyhigh-heavy.name_ja: アラビアン・スカイハイ (強)
notes: Perform a spinning kick in mid-air that creates an air current that you then use to perform a mid-air jump. It's possible to perform jump attacks after the mid-air jump
Can be affected by air currents from frames 1 - 21
Can transition to any mid-air normal attack, unique attack or special move from frame 62 until landing on the ground
Can hit an opponent outside of a combo from frames 21 - 29

arabian-skyhigh-od.name: Arabian Skyhigh (OD)
arabian-skyhigh-od.name_ja: アラビアン・スカイハイ (OD)
notes: Perform a spinning kick in mid-air that creates an air current that you then use to perform a mid-air jump. It's possible to perform jump attacks after the mid-air jump
Can be affected by air currents from frames 1 - 13
Can transition to any mid-air normal attack, unique attack or special move from frame 51 until landing on the ground only when the attack is blocked or misses
Can hit an opponent outside of a combo from frames 14 - 21

super-rashid-kick.name: Super Rashid Kick
super-rashid-kick.name_ja: スーパー・ラシード・キック
notes: Offload a devastating kick while soaring forward and up through the air. Landing the initial hit on a grounded opponent will increase the move's damage
Invincible to strikes and throws from frames 1 - 16
During the attack’s active frames from frames 3 - 7 on hit, when the attack hits an airborne opponent, the properties change and damage is set to 1800
Considered airborne from frames 10 - 36
The minimum guaranteed damage is 30%
Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter

invuln.strike_throw: Invincible to strikes and throws from frames 1 - 16

super-rashid-kick.notes_sc: Useful anti-air and combo/juggle tool; deals 300 less damage vs. airborne opponents with variable KD Advantage based on juggle height; grounded hit gives a cinematic that switches sides; bounces far away on block, but easily punished with dash or Drive Rush starter; listed recovery is on whiff/(block); only 500 damage on first hit if it trades

ysaar.name: Ysaar
notes: Kick out with both legs to create a large advancing whirlwind. Movements or special moves that make contact with the whirlwind will have their properties changed
An air current is generated during the attack’s entire active frame duration and for 100 frames after the active frames are finished
Ysaar becomes faster if Arabian Cyclone’s first hit is collides with the attack during the active frames
The minimum guaranteed damage is 40%
Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter
ysaar.notes_sc: No invincibility; puts opponent into limited juggle state; spawns a 5-hit Super projectile tornado; travels fullscreen on its own, and Rashid can kick it with 214P to make it travel faster (can also kick tornado in the opposite direction after a side switch); tornado remains active even if it disappears off-screen; creates Air Current that lasts until 120f after Super dissipates (enhances many of Rashid's moves); listed KD Advantage is from point blank connect; cannot use 236K Whirlwind Shot while Super is active; cannot gain Super Art gauge while the projectile hitbox is active

altair.name: Altair
notes: Twirl around and summon a whirlwind that lifts up your opponent, before Rashid barrages them with a series of powerful blows. A versatile move, perfect for combos, reversals, and as a way of dealing with projectiles
Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 16
Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter
The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%
Note: Can only be canceled into from special moves

invuln.full: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 16

altair.notes_sc: Reaches about half screen; cinematic time regenerates ~1.8 Drive bars for Rashid; only deals 10 damage when trading with opponent's attack

altair-ca.name: Altair (Critical Art)
notes: When under 25% vitality
Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 16
Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter
The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%
Note: Can only be canceled into from special moves

invuln.full: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 16

riding-glider.name: Riding Glider
riding-glider.name_ja: ライディング・グライド
notes: When near opponent
Grab the opponent, get them off balance, then send them tumbling with a kick. Throws your opponent without switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
riding-glider.notes_sc: Allows for a corner throw loop by holding Run for 18-20f, then letting go before throwing (17-20f for Blanka/E.Honda/Zangief); a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

sunset-drop.name: Sunset Drop
sunset-drop.name_ja: サンセット・ドロップ
notes: When near opponent
Grab the opponent, disrupt their balance, then flip up before coming down with both feet to stomp them into the ground. Throws your opponent while switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
sunset-drop.notes_sc: Side switches; Rashid can pressure with DR~6HK (+1 oB) midscreen or corner; or DR~2HP in the corner (huge pushback, links to SA1); a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

desert-slider.name: Desert Slider
desert-slider.name_ja: デザート・スライダー
notes: During a jump
When near opponent
Grab the opponent, ride on their back as you descend, then send them skidding along the ground on impact. Throws your opponent without switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
desert-slider.notes_sc: Useful air-to-air against close range jumps; in the corner, can get oki with Drive Rush
